zh.lifeSummary: 當Loretta de Quincy於1180年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，她的父親Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester20歲，母親Margaret de Beaumont26歲。她與William de Valognes結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1270年在她的家鄉享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Loretta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Lauretta  , normally borne by Roman Catholics, among whom it is associated with   Loreto .

variants.name: Lauretta
meanings: diminutive form of   Laura  , also sometimes used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Loretta de Quincy was born in 1180, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, was 20 and her mother, Margaret de Beaumont, was 26. She married William de Valognes. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1270, in her hometown, at the age of 90.

Elle a épousé William de Valognes. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Loretta de Quincyが1180年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchesterは20歳，母Margaret de Beaumontは26歳であった。William de Valognesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1270年に故郷で90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Loretta de Quincy(이)가 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Beaumont(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 William de Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 그녀의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Loretta de Quincy родилась в 1180 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beaumont, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Valognes. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1270 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 90 лет.
